title: Bump CI VMs
body:
Get new systemd-257~rc1 on rawhide, see what happens with #24220

Built in : https://github.com/containers/automation_images/pull/394

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *edsantiago* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [edsantiago] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

[Lots of package changes](https://github.com/containers/automation_images/pull/394#issuecomment-2483235077). Whether or not this does anything for #24220, seems to me this is a good candidate for merging.

Followup: no luck. [Still seeing flake in rawhide](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5723787419713536/html/int-podman-rawhide-root-host-sqlite.log.html#t--Podman-play-kube-with-build-Check-that-command-is-expanded--1), and I confirmed that the failing PR includes the newer systemd.
